case_for: Kelce has scored 12+ in four of his last six games and comes in with strong recent momentum (25.0 and 22.0 in his last two), showing he's fully integrated into the Chiefs' passing game.
case_against: His volatility is real—two of his last six games landed well below the threshold (7.0 and 5.7), showing weeks with limited red-zone or target volume can tank his floor.
